overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a grassy field at night, following a narrow dirt path. The footage appears to be from a survival video game, featuring tall grass, scattered trees, and dim moonlight illuminating the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with narrow dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through tall grass, approaching a tree on the left side

entered.detail: tall green and brown grass surrounding the path on all sides
narrow winding dirt trail cutting through the grass
single tree with visible trunk leaning slightly over the path
dark silhouette of forest on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark grassy field at night, viewed from a first-person perspective walking along a narrow dirt path. Tall grass surrounds the trail while a solitary tree becomes visible on the left approach, with a distant tree line marking the horizon under a clear night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy trail with dense tree line and canopy on left

events.description: passing under the canopy of the leaning tree, reducing sky visibility on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path while passing the large tree and moving alongside dense underbrush

entered.detail: thick bushes and low vegetation filling the space beneath the trees
scattered shrubbery on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the solitary tree, entering a section where dense underbrush lines the left side of the path, partially obscuring the sky. The vegetation becomes thicker, creating a more enclosed feeling as the walk continues through the moonlit grassland.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland clearing with scattered rocks

events.description: emerging from the tree cover back into open field with wider visibility

agents.ego_description: walking through the open field, passing rocks on the right side of the path

entered.detail: large rocks or boulders visible on the right side of the trail
distant wooden posts or fence structure barely visible in the darkness

segments.scene_description: The path opens up again into a wide clearing as the camera leaves the tree line behind. Rocks become visible on the right side of the path, and a distant wooden structure appears on the horizon as the walk continues through the expansive night-time grassland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a moonlit grassland that shifts from an open field into a dense thicket before expanding into a wide clearing. It begins by walking along a narrow dirt path flanked by tall grass, moving toward a solitary tree and a distant horizon under a clear night sky. As the camera passes the tree, the environment becomes more enclosed, with dense underbrush lining the left side of the path and partially obscuring the view of the sky. The scene then opens up again as the camera leaves the thick vegetation behind, revealing scattered rocks on the right. Finally, the path leads into an expansive clearing where a distant wooden structure emerges on the horizon.
